headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Equal-Weight on CarMax, Raises Price Target to $43
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Jeff Lick   maintains CarMax (NYSE:KMX) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $39 to $43.
